checks.expected: 1/64/256 worlds for 1,000 steps and 1024 worlds for 10,000 steps

protocol.compilation_timing: explicit lower().compile(), excluded from measured execution

cpu_gpu_consistency.schedule: fixed piecewise action schedule using integer control-step indices

protocol.memory_sampling: process VRAM from nvidia-smi and allocator statistics from the JAX device, sampled after synchronized chunks
protocol.track_scope: M2 is a physics-only gate. Per-world deterministic actions and masked resets are exercised here; independent procedural tracks are deferred until the M3 Track layer.

warmup.purpose: settle lazy kernels and allocator pools before memory and throughput sampling

capacities.scope_note: naconmax/naccdmax are global flattened Warp buffers; peak nefc is the maximum per-world count observed after vmap. njmax_nnz is recorded from Data._impl.
